prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: STRUCTURE OF THE C115A MUTANT OF MURA COMPLEXED WITH THE FLUORINATED ANALOG OF THE REACTION TETRAHEDRAL INTERMEDIATE. Entity description: UDP-N-ACETYLGLUCOSAMINE ENOLPYRUVYL TRANSFERASE. Entry keywords: TRANSFERASE TRANSFERASE, PEPTIDOGLYCAN SYNTHESIS, ENOLPYRUVYL TRANSFERASE, UDP-N-ACETYLGLUCOSAMINE. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.451074; mean_interface=0.268745; max_segment_membrane_density=0.804233; mean_disorder=0.148049. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.
V68 E65 generic complex control source. generic_complex_only generic complex only; complex annotation alone is not biological_oligomer_context, not obligate assembly, and not assembly_required_core.
